_comment: OPT-IN spawn-budget guard. Merge the 'hooks' block into your project's .claude/settings.json to cap runaway subagent fan-out (motivated by the June 2026 runaway-subagent incident). The jq guard blocks any single message that spawns more than MAX_PARALLEL Task calls by exiting 2; tune the limit to taste. Remove if it gets in your way — it is a safety net, not part of the loop.

hooks.command: MAX_PARALLEL=6; COUNT_FILE="/tmp/agentic-spawn-count-$PPID"; NOW=$(date +%s); if [ -f "$COUNT_FILE" ]; then read -r TS N < "$COUNT_FILE"; if [ $((NOW - TS)) -lt 60 ]; then N=$((N + 1)); else N=1; TS=$NOW; fi; else N=1; TS=$NOW; fi; echo "$TS $N" > "$COUNT_FILE"; if [ "$N" -gt "$MAX_PARALLEL" ]; then echo "spawn-guard: more than $MAX_PARALLEL subagent spawns within 60s — refusing (runaway fan-out protection). Consolidate the work or raise MAX_PARALLEL in .claude/settings.json." >&2; exit 2; fi
